texto: I really like dating stories, like in Betty and Veronica comics; I like David Lynch and H.P. Lovecraft for the dark gut-wrenching stuff, and I'm inspired by Miyazaki's films for the subtle heart-warming moments, as well as the moments that blew up my imagination.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Fred Seibert: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I really like dating stories, like in Betty and Veronica comics; I like David Lynch and H.P. Love…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, imagination, moments pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao-noturna.
